name: dark-matter-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugins for development skills, agents, and productivity

plugins.name: dm-lang
plugins.description: Expert language skills: Go, Rust, TypeScript, Python, Just - idiomatic patterns, type systems, and build tools

plugins.name: dm-arch
plugins.description: Architecture patterns: SOLID principles, composition, data-oriented design, and module organization

plugins.name: dm-game
plugins.description: Comprehensive game development skills: vision, systems, mechanics evaluation, balance, economy, motivation, encounters, narrative, multiplayer, accessibility, audio, data-driven design, experience design, player UX, progression, game feel, playtest methodology, per-frame performance, and PixiJS 8 bootstrapping

plugins.name: dm-work
plugins.description: Workflow tools: orchestration, subagent delegation, spec breakdown, peer review, competitive generation, evaluator-judge protocol, browser QA, repo init/health, worktrees, and session retros

plugins.name: dm-team
plugins.description: Agent Teams patterns: lead/teammate roles, council deliberation, and collaborative review (experimental)
